name: Yuen Kuan Moon

work_experience.title: Various leadership roles in Marketing, Business Development, Regional Operations
work_experience.description: Joined Singtel in 1993, holding leadership positions in marketing, business development and sales.

work_experience.title: General Manager, Product Development
work_experience.description: Appointed GM of product development for Telkomsel, Singtel's regional associate in Indonesia.

work_experience.title: Vice President, Regional Operations
work_experience.description: Led regional operations across Singtel's associates.

work_experience.title: CEO, Consumer Singapore
work_experience.description: Oversaw delivery of mobile, broadband, and TV services. Managed consumer policies including PDPA compliance and Netflix partnership in 2016.

work_experience.title: Group Chief Digital Officer
work_experience.description: Led Singtel's digital growth opportunities and transformation. Spearheaded partnership with AIA for StepUp wellness platform.

work_experience.title: Group Chief Executive Officer
work_experience.description: Leads Singtel's global strategy, overseeing consumer, enterprise and digital businesses across Asia. Directing one of Singtel's most ambitious transformations to reposition for growth amid digitalisation.

person_relationships.description: Yuen succeeded Chua Sock Koong as Singtel Group CEO in January 2021.
Lee Theng Kiat is Chairman of Singtel while Yuen is Group CEO.

major_achievements.achievement: Appointed Group CEO of Singtel, Asia's leading communications technology group, selected from among nine internal candidates.
Led the consumer business through integrated expansion into mobile, broadband and TV services.
Spearheaded partnership with AIA to launch StepUp wellness platform, combining digital innovation with health promotion.
Oversaw Singtel's first partnership with Netflix, expanding content offerings for consumers.

biography_summary: Yuen Kuan Moon (born 1967) is a Singaporean business executive who has served as Group Chief Executive Officer of Singapore Telecommunications Limited (Singtel) since January 2021. He joined Singtel in 1993 and has held various leadership positions including CEO of Consumer Singapore (2012-2020), Group Chief Digital Officer (2018-2020), and Vice President of Regional Operations. He was selected as CEO from among nine internal candidates. He holds a First Class Honours degree in Engineering from the University of Western Australia and a Master of Science from Stanford University's Sloan Program. Under his leadership, Singtel has undergone one of its most ambitious transformations to reposition for growth amid accelerated digitalisation in the telecommunications industry.

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with data from wiki.sg, Singtel official site, NCS, GSMA, and Telkomsel. Full career timeline, education, birth year, biography, achievements, and relationships added.
